dict.string: Hestia needs full calendar access to show your upcoming events, create new events, and help manage your schedule.
Hestia needs calendar access to show your upcoming events and help manage your schedule.
Hestia uses the camera to let you customize your agent avatars.
Hestia uses Face ID to secure your conversations and personal data.
Hestia reads your health data to provide personalized health coaching, daily briefings, and activity insights. Your data stays on your devices and server — it is never shared with third parties.
Hestia needs microphone access to record your voice journal entries.
Hestia uses your photo library to let you customize your agent avatars.
Hestia needs full reminders access to show your tasks, create new reminders, and help you stay organized.
Hestia needs reminders access to help you manage tasks and to-dos.
Hestia uses speech recognition to transcribe your voice journal entries.
